---
metadata-files:
  - report-config.yml
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
    template-partials:
      - before-body.tex
    documentclass: SCreport
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    link-citations: true
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: SCblue
    filecolor: SCblue
    urlcolor: SCblue
    citecolor: SCblue
    toccolor: SCblue
    highlight-style: github
    code-block-bg: "#f6f8fa"
    code-block-border-left: "#c5c5c5"
    code-font: "Consolas, Monaco, 'Andale Mono', monospace"
    filters:
      - inline-code.lua
    header-includes: |
     \usepackage{mathptmx}
     \usepackage{xcolor}
     \usepackage{eso-pic}
     \usepackage{morefloats}
     \extrafloats{200}
     \usepackage{placeins}
     \definecolor{inlinecodecolor}{RGB}{40, 44, 52}
     \definecolor{inlinecodebg}{RGB}{245, 245, 245}
     \let\oldtexttt\texttt
     \renewcommand{\texttt}[1]{\colorbox{inlinecodebg}{\textcolor{inlinecodecolor}{\oldtexttt{#1}}}}
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    link-citations: true
    colorlinks: true
    html-math-method: mathml
    highlight-style: github
    self-contained: true
    css: styles.css
---

{{< include report-body.qmd >}}
